title: BEM-844 execute repair
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/state','governance/reports','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport','governance/audit_mailbox/gpt_to_claude','governance/workflow_dispatch_queue']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-23 | 14:34 (UTC+3)'
def load(p):
    p=Path(p)
    try: return json.loads(p.read_text(errors='ignore')) if p.exists() else {}
    except Exception as exc: return {'_load_error':str(exc)}
route=load('governance/state/bem843_route_after_bem842.json')
rs=route.get('status')
created_files=[]
if rs=='process_real_claude_response_next':
    status='process_protocol_selected'
    next_action='extract Claude decision and create agreed protocol document'
elif rs=='patch_claude_response_writer_next':
    # Strengthen the request and ensure dispatcher is queued again. This is not a fake Claude answer.
    mail=Path('governance/audit_mailbox/gpt_to_claude/bem844_force_real_claude_response.md')
    mail.write_text('# BEM-844 | FORCE REAL CLAUDE RESPONSE'+sep+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+sep+'Claude Internal Auditor: previous pipeline reached dispatch/runtime proof but no valid Claude response was found. Write a real response now to `governance/audit_mailbox/claude_to_gpt/bem844_claude_response.md`.'+sep+sep+'Mandatory format:'+sep+'Decision: APPROVED / CHANGE_REQUIRED / BLOCKED'+sep+'Protocol agreement: <yes/no>'+sep+'Required changes: <list or none>'+sep+'Reason: <short>'+sep+sep+'Do not create runtime blocker files. Do not write issue comments.'+sep)
    q=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/bem844_force_real_claude_response_dispatch.json')
    q.write_text(json.dumps({'schema_version':'workflow_dispatch_queue_item.v10','workflow':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','workflow_id':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','ref':'main','inputs':{},'reason':'BEM-844 force real Claude response writer retry','created_at':created},indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
    created_files.extend([str(mail),str(q)])
    status='forced_real_response_request_queued'
    next_action='fresh tick then verify real Claude response only'
elif rs=='repair_dispatch_results_next':
    q=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/bem844_dispatch_result_probe.json')
    q.write_text(json.dumps({'schema_version':'workflow_dispatch_queue_item.v10','workflow':'codex-runner.yml','workflow_id':'codex-runner.yml','ref':'main','inputs':{},'reason':'BEM-844 dispatch result writer repair probe','created_at':created},indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
    created_files.append(str(q))
    status='dispatch_result_probe_queued'
    next_action='fresh tick then verify dispatch results'
elif rs=='repair_runtime_state_next':
    q=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/bem844_runtime_state_probe.json')
    q.write_text(json.dumps({'schema_version':'workflow_dispatch_queue_item.v10','workflow':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','workflow_id':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','ref':'main','inputs':{},'reason':'BEM-844 runtime state repair probe','created_at':created},indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
    created_files.append(str(q))
    status='runtime_state_probe_queued'
    next_action='fresh tick then verify runtime state'
else:
    status='unknown_route_noop'
    next_action='diagnose BEM-843 route status'
state={'bem':'BEM-844','status':status,'route_status':rs,'created_files':created_files,'next_action':next_action,'created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem844_execute_bem843_repair.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem844_execute_bem843_repair.md').write_text('# BEM-844 | Execute BEM-843 Repair | '+status+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem844_next.md').write_text('Next: '+next_action+sep+'Operator relay forbidden. Report does not stop development.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-844'+sep+sep+'Status: '+status+sep+'Next: '+next_action+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed=['governance/state/bem844_execute_bem843_repair.json','governance/reports/bem844_execute_bem843_repair.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem844_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl']+created_files
changed_files.extend(changed)
ops_applied.append('Executed the repair selected by BEM-843; if the remaining proof is real Claude response, forced a valid response request and queued dispatcher retry')
"""
No issue comments.
